content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Catalyst
description: Legendary Catalyst is a Legendary class mod for Gaige in Borderlands 2. It is a Maliwan mod (orange rarity) introduced with Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge.
notes: Any sub-level 50 versions show reduced skill bonuses, but are not obtainable through legitimate play. This mod requires the Digistruct Peak DLC and is unavailable without it.

special.description: At maximum level: Team elemental effect damage +62%.
special.title: "Shocking, isn't it?"
